workflow_name.description: Workflow type name registered with the Temporal worker (e.g. "GreetingWorkflow").

workflow_id.description: Unique workflow execution id. Pass an explicit id so the agent can correlate later describe/cancel calls.

task_queue.description: Task queue the workflow should be scheduled on. Must match a queue the worker is polling.

args.description: Positional workflow arguments passed through to ExecuteWorkflow as variadic args.
